subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Lord of Eternity unto him who turned towards the Cause when every heedless doubter turned away therefrom. O Nasru'llah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک القدم لمن اقبل الی الامر اذ اعرض عنه کل غافل مرتاب یا نصرالله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of the Manifestation of God
